changes.description: Two-layer cognition node ontology module: 20 authored cognition nodes (7 conditions, 8 consequences, 3 combinations, 2 rules), each with 6 human explanation fields, graph connections (upstream/downstream/visible_in/verification_scope/related_rules), resolveNode() returning { ontology, runtime } shape, resolveConnections() resolving refs to human_names

Added CognitionOntology import, CognitionNodeExplanation rendering component, modified ConsequenceRulesProof (§4 rule explanation + per-consequence node explanations with graph refs), CombinationPatternsProof (§5.2 rule explanation + per-combination explanations with upstream refs), DerivationTraceProof (human_name annotations on trace nodes and rule references)

Added CSS for .vp-explanation, .vp-explanation--rule, .vp-explanation-name, .vp-explanation-text, .vp-operational-implication, .vp-graph-context, .vp-graph-direction, .vp-graph-arrow, .vp-graph-ref (with hover), .vp-proof-trace-human (with before/after pseudo-elements)
